articles.title: Boston Fleet look for scoring boost as newly acquired Jessie Eldridge makes her debut Tuesday night
articles.description:
“Jessie’s consistency in being a dual threat and being able to put pucks in the net herself or create high-IQ, quality plays makes her so dangerous any time she touches the puck. And I think that’s a piece that we were missing.”

The post Boston Fleet look for scoring boost as newly acquired Jessie Eldridge makes her debut Tuesday night appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jessie Eldridge debuts with the Boston Fleet on Tuesday night, enhancing team scoring.
Eldridge's dual-threat capability aims to address the Fleet's scoring challenges.
Local fans anticipate improved performance and excitement in upcoming games.

articles.title: An expert explains why the recent Danvers murder stands out
articles.description:
While adults usually kill for recognizable reasons, teens often kill “for no good reason."

The post An expert explains why the recent Danvers murder stands out appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Teen murder in Danvers highlights troubling trend of youth violence in Massachusetts.
Experts note that teens often kill without clear motives, raising community concerns.
Local residents fear increased violence and demand better youth support programs.

articles.title: MGB researchers just developed a new risk calculator for obesity. Here’s why that’s a game changer.
articles.description:
The new tool could help predict obesity-related health risks earlier and reshape prevention strategies, researchers say.

The post MGB researchers just developed a new risk calculator for obesity. Here’s why that’s a game changer. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: MGB researchers developed a new obesity risk calculator to predict health risks earlier.
The tool aims to reshape obesity prevention strategies for Boston residents.
Early risk assessment could lead to improved health outcomes for the local community.

articles.title: Why this ICU nurse is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support trauma recovery
articles.description:
Erin Daniel is running the 2026 Boston Marathon for Brigham and Women's Hospital's Stepping Strong team.

The post Why this ICU nurse is running the 2026 Boston Marathon to support trauma recovery appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ICU nurse Erin Daniel will run the 2026 Boston Marathon to raise funds for trauma recovery.
She supports Brigham and Women's Hospital's Stepping Strong team, enhancing local trauma care.
Funds raised will directly benefit Boston residents recovering from traumatic injuries.

articles.title: Poll: Mass. Legislature underwater in court of public opinion
articles.description:
Massachusetts residents highly prize transparency and want to see an audit of the Legislature, the poll found.

The post Poll: Mass. Legislature underwater in court of public opinion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts residents demand transparency from the Legislature, according to a recent poll.
The poll indicates a strong desire for a legislative audit among voters.
Public trust in the Legislature remains low, affecting local political engagement.
